notes: Term hints come from checked-in curriculum grids and do not prove live course availability.
Verify target-term offerings, restrictions, and approvals with Auburn or an advisor.

planningNotes: Verify senior standing and any department approval requirements for Senior Design Project.
Treat Program Assessment as a zero-credit graduation milestone, not a credit-bearing course load item.
Treat the university graduation requirement as a zero-credit milestone and verify completion steps with an advisor.
Treat Engineering Orientation as a zero-credit milestone and verify how it applies with an advisor.
Confirm the course is an approved AI elective and is offered in the target term before registration.

requirementBlocks.CORE SCIENCE SEQUENCE: Confirm the approved core science sequence and whether its courses are offered in the intended terms.
requirementBlocks.CORE HISTORY SEQUENCE: Confirm the approved core history sequence and target-term offerings with an advisor.
requirementBlocks.CORE LITERATURE: Choose a qualifying core literature course only after Degree Works and target-term offering review.
requirementBlocks.CORE SOCIAL SCIENCE ELECTIVE: Choose a qualifying core social science elective only after Degree Works and target-term offering review.
requirementBlocks.CORE FINE ARTS: Choose a qualifying core fine arts course only after Degree Works and target-term offering review.
requirementBlocks.MATH ELECTIVE: Verify the approved math elective list, prerequisites, and target-term offering before selection.
requirementBlocks.MATH ELECTIVES: Verify the approved math elective list, prerequisites, and target-term offering before selection.
requirementBlocks.TECHNICAL ELECTIVES: Verify CSSE approval, prerequisites, and target-term offerings before choosing technical electives.
requirementBlocks.FREE ELECTIVE: Confirm how a proposed free elective applies in Degree Works and whether it is offered in the target term.
